name: Coconut Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter over low heat, then remove from heat.
2. Add 2 cups of sugar to the melted butter and whisk together.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Blend in the sifted flour, cocoa powder, salt, and remaining sugar.
5. Stir in the flaked coconut and chocolate chips (and walnuts if using).
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9 inch pan.
7. Sprinkle any remaining ingredients evenly over the top of the batter.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until set.
9. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into bars.
The coconut in this recipe makes them nice and moist. Enjoy! You'll get lots of compliments on this one.
